prompt: Napravi agenta koji orchestrira naš CI/CD pipeline. Treba da pozove tri pod-agenta: security scanner, unit test runner, i code quality checker — i da vrati jedan konsolidovani izveštaj sa ukupnim verdiktom PASS/FAIL.
assertions: The output includes a <role> block identifying it as an orchestrator
The output includes an agent roster listing all 3 sub-agents with their input/output schemas
The output specifies an invocation pattern (MCP, A2A, or function call)
The output includes timeout values (per-agent and/or global timeout)
The output includes consolidation logic showing how PASS/FAIL verdict is determined from sub-agent results
The output includes a <failure_modes> section covering sub-agent timeout and sub-agent failure scenarios
The output includes a <example> block with POPULATED data (real branch names, test counts, verdicts — not placeholders)
The output includes a JSON schema for the consolidated report with at least 5 fields
The total system prompt is at least 5000 characters
The skill explicitly classifies the agent type as orchestrator
